task_completion.description: The title 'Causes of World War I' is present at the top of the page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box containing 'Causes of World War I' (or similar containing 'Causes') positioned at the top of the ActivInspire canvas.

task_completion.description: A central spine line and a head shape labeled 'WWI' are present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A main horizontal line (the spine) and at least one shape (the head) containing the text 'WWI' at one end of the line.

task_completion.description: At least four branching lines (ribs) are connected to the central spine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four or more diagonal or vertical lines branching off from the main horizontal spine line.

task_completion.description: The four ribs are labeled with the M.A.I.N. causes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text boxes placed near the four rib lines containing the exact words 'Militarism', 'Alliances', 'Imperialism', and 'Nationalism'.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the directory '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' and filename 'ww1_fishbone.flipchart', OR the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'ww1_fishbone.flipchart', OR a file manager showing the saved file.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the diagram rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ActivInspire application open with tools being actively used on the canvas, not a terminal window executing a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The diagram is composed of actual lines, shapes, and text boxes in ActivInspire, not an imported image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of selection handles on shapes/lines, or the visible use of the pen, shape, and text tools in the ActivInspire toolbar.

integrity.description: The agent used ActivInspire to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distinct ActivInspire interface (menus, toolbars, flipchart page) is clearly visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is an ActivInspire flipchart saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/ww1_fishbone.flipchart'. The diagram must contain at least 5 lines (1 spine + 4 ribs), at least 1 shape (the head), and the exact text labels: 'Militarism', 'Alliances', 'Imperialism', 'Nationalism', 'WWI', and 'Causes'.
